CONTENT.Biography: Schiavon made his professional debuts with Belluno, in Serie D. He spent the most part of his career playing for Serie D and Serie C clubs.In August 2010 he left SPAL to rejoin Portosummaga.On 23 June 2011 Cittadella signed Schiavon after a successful season at Portosummaga.In January 2016 Schiavon signs again with SPAL in Lega Pro, third division of Italy. On the 23rd of April with SPAL he wins division three moving up to Serie B after 23 years from the last time.On 9 August 2018, he joined Serie C side Pro Vercelli for free.On 7 July 2021, he moved to an amateur side Sant'Agostino.

SUMMARY: Eros Schiavon (born 24 April 1983) is an Italian footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Sant'Agostino.
